antipattern.symptom: LLM emits **bold** which TTS reads as 'asterisk asterisk bold'.
antipattern.root-cause: System prompt did not forbid markdown.
antipattern.fix: Add explicit no-markdown clause; add a deterministic strip pass before TTS.

antipattern.symptom: Tool call causes 2+ seconds of silence.
antipattern.root-cause: Pipeline did not pre-stage a filler phrase.
antipattern.fix: Insert filler-phrase synthesis before tool dispatch.
Switch to per-minute telephony cost; LLM cost is a small share.
